content:
# Fwi

**Summary**: An iterative seismic imaging method that uses the entire wavefield to build high-resolution velocity models.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018]] applied FWI to reconstruct velocity models from both acoustic and viscoelastic synthetic data.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Acoustic FWI successfully reconstructed a velocity image with small local anomalies and strong velocity contrast for acoustic synthetic data. ([[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018, p. 15]])
